title: Wheatley Totem
description: Turns totems of undying into Wheatley from Portal 2
body:
Turns all Totems of undying into Wheatley from Portal 2.

You can also rename your totems to turn them into the other cores (Space Core, Fact Core & Adventure Core).

The texture is animated too! so he blinks and looks around.

![how he looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AVusjvaW/images/51adf0a2f7f7ef108476ddbe0ef1a23a6e6a1c93.png)
